codeReview.summary: The export flow implementation matches the feature description and expected behavior: both entry points open Export Profile, Export transitions to Export Complete, reveal toggle and Copy feedback are present, and Done dismisses back to dashboard. One non-blocking robustness gap was identified in the copy handler.

issues.description: The copy action calls `navigator.clipboard?.writeText(...)` without awaiting/catching failures and immediately shows success feedback. If clipboard write is rejected (permission/security constraints), users still see success and an unhandled promise rejection may surface in console. Wrap in try/catch and only show success feedback on resolved write.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ui-builder skill says to invoke agent-browser for manual verification, but it does not document the concrete CLI subcommands used in practice. The worker initially tried an invalid `agent-browser ... launch` command and had to inspect help before using `open`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton around lines 0536-0562 shows `agent-browser ... launch` failing with 'Unknown command: launch', followed by `agent-browser --help` and successful `agent-browser ... open`.

summary: PASS with one non-blocking issue: copy success feedback is shown without handling clipboard write failures. Feature coverage is otherwise complete and aligned with expected behavior.
